zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Stumpe於1540年出生在英國維爾爾馬爾斯波利時，她的父親Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury30歲，母親Lady Bridget de Baynton35歲。她於1563年5月13日與Sir Henry Knyvett在英國英格蘭維爾爾拉可可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1585年7月14日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾查爾頓 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Stumpe于1540年出生在英国維爾爾馬爾斯波利时，她的父亲Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury30岁，母亲Lady Bridget de Baynton35岁。她于1563年5月13日与Sir Henry Knyvett在英国英格兰維爾爾拉可可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1585年7月14日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾查爾頓 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: Stumpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stump
meanings: English and German: from Middle Low German stump ‘tree stump’ (borrowed into Middle English), hence a topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent tree stump, or else a nickname for a short, stocky person.
German: nickname from Middle High German stumpf ‘maimed, mentally incompetent’ for a dull or inexperienced person.
German (mainly northern and central): variant of   Stumm  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Stumpe was born in 1540, in Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury, was 30 and her mother, Lady Bridget de Baynton, was 35. She married Sir Henry Knyvett on 13 May 1563, in Lacock, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 14 July 1585, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Stumpe est née en 1540, à Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Bridget de Baynton, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Knyvett le 13 mai 1563, à Lacock, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 juillet 1585, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat am 13. Mai 1563 in Lacock, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Henry Knyvett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Stumpe è nata il nel 1540 nel Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Bridget de Baynton, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Knyvett il 13 maggio 1563, nel Lacock, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Stumpeが1540年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルメスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir James Stumpe of Malmesburyは30歳，母Lady Bridget de Bayntonは35歳であった。1563年5月13日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアラコックでSir Henry Knyvettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1585年7月14日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアチャールトン スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Stumpe(이)가 1540년 영국 윌츠히르 맬메스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Bridget de Baynton(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1563년 5월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 라콕에서 Sir Henry Knyvett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1585년 7월 14일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 찰턴 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Stumpe nasceu em 1540, em Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Bridget de Baynton, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Knyvett em 13 de maio de 1563, em Lacock, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de julho de 1585, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Stumpe родилась в 1540 г. в местности малмесбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir James Stumpe of Malmesbury было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Bridget de Baynton, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Knyvett 13 мая 1563 г. в местности лакокк, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 14 июля 1585 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности чарлтон ст питир, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Henry Knyvett el 13 de mayo de 1563, en Lacock, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 14 de julio de 1585, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Charlton St Peter, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
